about.title: About Doctasime
about.content1: At Doctasime, we believe in the healing power of nature. We carefully select the purest herbs and extracts from around the world to craft remedies that support your journey toward holistic wellness.
about.content2: Our mission is to bridge the gap between ancient herbal traditions and modern clinical standards. Every product we make is rigorously tested, fully organic, and designed with your health in mind.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Doctasimo website, mobile experiences, and related services. By accessing or purchasing from us, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Body:
By using Doctasimo ("we", "us", "our") you confirm that you are at least the age of majority in your jurisdiction or have parental consent where required.

If you do not agree, you must not use our services.
terms.s2Body:
Doctasimo offers botanical wellness products, health information, and related e-commerce services. Product descriptions, images, and availability may change without notice.

We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders for reasons including stock limits, suspected fraud, pricing errors, or shipping constraints.
terms.s3Body:
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.

Provide accurate registration and checkout information. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.
terms.s4Body:
Prices are displayed in the currency shown at checkout and may include applicable taxes where indicated. Payment is processed through our authorized payment partners.

Delivery timelines are estimates and depend on carriers and your location. Risk of loss passes in accordance with our carrier arrangements and applicable law.
terms.s5Body:
Our products are traditional herbal formulations. They are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease, and they are not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

Always consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting any supplement or if you have a medical condition, are pregnant or nursing, or take medication.
terms.s6Body:
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Doctasimo and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising from your use of our services or products.

Our total liability for any claim relating to a given order shall not exceed the amount you paid for that order.
terms.s7Body:
These terms are governed by the laws applicable in the Republic of Cameroon, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, except where mandatory consumer protections in your country apply.

Questions: support@doctasimo.com. We may update these terms from time to time; continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Doctasimo collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information when you visit our site, create an account, or place an order.
privacy.s1Body: Doctasimo operates e-commerce and wellness services focused on customers in Cameroon and the region. For privacy inquiries, contact: support@doctasimo.com.
privacy.s2Body: We may collect: account details (name, email, phone); delivery and billing addresses; order and payment transaction references (card data is handled by our payment processors, not stored on our servers in full); device and usage data (IP address, browser type, pages viewed); and communications you send to support or clinicians where applicable.
privacy.s3Body:
We use personal data to process and deliver orders, provide customer support, secure our platform, improve our products and services, send transactional messages (order confirmations, shipping updates), and comply with legal obligations.

With your consent where required, we may send marketing communications; you can opt out at any time using the link in those messages or by contacting us.
privacy.s4Body:
Where the law requires a legal basis, we rely on contract performance (fulfilling your order), legitimate interests (security and improvement), consent (marketing), and legal obligation.

We share data with service providers such as payment processors, logistics partners, and hosting providers, only as needed for the purposes above. We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.s5Body:
We retain personal information for as long as needed to provide services, meet legal, tax, and accounting requirements, and resolve disputes.

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect data; no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.s6Body:
Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, to object to certain processing, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

To exercise rights, email support@doctasimo.com. We will respond within a reasonable period as required by law.
privacy.s7Body: We may update this policy to reflect operational, legal, or regulatory changes. The "Last updated" date will be revised, and material changes may be communicated by email or a notice on our website where appropriate.
